name: sc-mcp
description: Unofficial read-only MCP server for Scalable Capital broker data — overview, holdings, transactions, analytics, quotes, search, news.

uv_path.title: Path to uvx
uv_path.description: Usually just 'uvx'. If Claude Desktop can't find it (common on macOS), set the full path — e.g. /opt/homebrew/bin/uvx, /usr/local/bin/uvx, or ~/.local/bin/uvx. Requires uv installed (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) and a logged-in sc CLI.
